Both pizza and sushi seem to be favorite foods. Pizza is something the user sent money for (Pizza party), and sushi was received from someone else (Sushi dinner).

I'll use "Pizza" as the favorite food since the user themselves sent money for a "Pizza party". That seems like a clear favorite.
